  1. Home /
  2. Districts

14 districts

Karlsruhe districts

Historic old town, modern science quarters, the alternative Suedstadt or affluent villa suburbs — every Karlsruhe district has its own character.

BaroqueFan layout

City Centre West

Schlossplatz, market square and the western pedestrian zone. Karlsruhe's baroque heart and the origin of the fan layout.

8 Sights 10 Hotels 13 Restaurants
UrbanTheatre

City Centre East

East of Karl-Friedrich-Strasse: Friedrichsplatz, the state theatre and a lively urban downtown atmosphere.

4 Sights 0 Hotels 7 Restaurants
MulticulturalAlternative

Suedstadt

A multicultural, alternative neighbourhood around Werderplatz and Werderstrasse.

3 Sights 0 Hotels 6 Restaurants
GründerzeitResidential

Suedweststadt

A Gründerzeit residential quarter with period buildings, the city park and the zoo close by.

1 Sights 2 Hotels 1 Restaurants
CollegesResidential

Weststadt

Mühlburger Tor, Yorkstrasse, colleges and residential living. Early classicism meets student life.

0 Sights 0 Hotels 0 Restaurants
Village coreLake

Mühlburg

A former village in the west, today a city district with the Entenfang lake and an old village core.

0 Sights 1 Hotels 0 Restaurants
HistoricMargraves

Durlach

A historic margravial town with the Karlsburg, an old town and the Turmberg rising above the city.

4 Sights 1 Hotels 1 Restaurants
KITStudents

Oststadt

Close to the KIT campus, a residential quarter with a large student presence near Gottesaue Palace.

2 Sights 0 Hotels 0 Restaurants
VillasResidential

Rüppurr

A southern residential district with villas, garden-city character and quiet streets.

0 Sights 3 Hotels 0 Restaurants
RhineIndustry

Daxlanden

To the south-west by the Rhine harbour, with industrial heritage and the Burgau nature reserve.

1 Sights 0 Hotels 0 Restaurants
HarbourLake

Knielingen

To the north-west by the Rhine harbour: new waterside living alongside industrial heritage.

0 Sights 0 Hotels 0 Restaurants
ForestLaw

Nordstadt

Close to the Hardtwald forest, with federal institutions and quiet residential living in the north.

2 Sights 0 Hotels 0 Restaurants
ForestArchitecture

Waldstadt

1950s prefab estates set in the middle of the forest. Green living with a surprising flair.

0 Sights 0 Hotels 0 Restaurants
VillageFarming

Neureut

The largest city district by area, with a village feel to the north-east.

0 Sights 0 Hotels 0 Restaurants

Karlsruhe interactive. Fan-shaped city, KIT, ZKM and the Federal Constitutional Court. Attractions, hotels, districts and tech news on one portal.
